ExportViewer.accessExpires: This is a secure, time-limited export. Access expires {date}.
ExportViewer.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to view this export.
ExportViewer.expiredDescription: This export link has expired. Please generate a new export from the application.
ExportViewer.notFoundDescription: This export link is invalid or has been removed.

PublicShareViewer.notFoundDescription: This patient share link is invalid or no longer available.
PublicShareViewer.revokedDescription: This patient share link has been replaced. Please ask your clinician for the latest QR code or link.
PublicShareViewer.toolbarDescription: View the document online or use Print / Save as PDF to keep a copy.
